creator: onatan@gmail.com
text:
This PR is a follow up to ports/101118.
A new version of metasploit 3 was released, incorporating our patches.
Modifications from previous shar: now users have to Accept the license
with a web-browser, so the port is made to ask for it. Logic for this
was blatantly ripped from java/diablo-* ports.

How-To-Repeat: Don't.
